excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Health Services Management lists Final round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-06-14. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline Priority round: 15 March 2026 Final round: 14 June 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged. If places are no longer available after the priority round, the subsequent applications received may not be considered.

matchedTextAfter: *Excluding the Postgraduate Certificate in Laws programme offered by the Faculty of Law
